summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of three major enhancements: High-Compliance industry page, AI Readiness Assessment in Free Audit section, and enhanced phishing game with difficulty levels, timers, streaks, badges, and sharing functionality. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: High-Compliance industry page renders at /industries/high-compliance-it-support with '100%' hero stat
High-Compliance page shows 4 challenge cards: CMMC 2.0, HIPAA, ITAR, Multi-Framework
High-Compliance page displays all required compliance items: CMMC 2.0, NIST 800-171, HIPAA, ITAR, FedRAMP
Homepage Industries section shows 'Learn more' link on High-Compliance card that navigates correctly
Free Audit section first bullet is 'AI readiness assessment'
Phishing game shows 3 difficulty buttons with correct details: Rookie (5 emails, no timer), Analyst (6 emails, 20s timer), CISO (7 emails, 12s timer)
Rookie mode starts game with no timer visible
Analyst mode starts game with countdown timer bar visible (tested showing 17s)
Game shows streak counter when 2+ correct in a row
Game results show Accuracy %, Best Streak, and Personal Best stats
Share Score button is present on results screen
Play Again button returns to difficulty selection (not auto-restart)
Badge system working with localStorage persistence (First Scan, Speed Demon, Hot Streak badges earned)
Game properly cycles through 15 emails (up from 8) based on difficulty level
